title: SQLancer crash on complex join
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER, b TEXT, c BOOLEAN);
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT a, b, CAST(c AS TEXT) AS c_str FROM t1 WHERE b IS NOT NULL;
SELECT SUM(COALESCE(v1.a, 0) + (CASE WHEN t1.b IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) FROM v1 LEFT JOIN t1 ON (v1.c_str LIKE '%' || t1.b || '%');
CREATE TABLE t2(x REAL, y DATE NOT NULL DEFAULT (DATE('now')));
key_bug_features: full outer join with complex view and cast operations
